known_gaps: Plumblink has no style collections (unlike Tile Africa) - it's a national plumbing/bathroom/kitchenware chain, not organised by look. The same real products are used across all 6 PGS styles, differentiated only by budget/mid/premium tier.

Plumblink only sells plumbing fixtures - no tiles, vanities, mirrors, towel rails, or storage furniture. Those categories always come from the Tile Africa catalogs regardless of which store is selected.

Built-in/inset baths were not found as a searchable product line on plumblink.co.za (site search returned kitchen sinks/troughs for 'inset bath' and 'fitted bath', not bathtubs) - only 'bath_freestanding' is sourced here. If a customer picks Built-in + Plumblink, buildQuote falls back to the Tile Africa built-in bath price for that style/tier.

Plumblink's site search is inconsistent - two-word phrases like 'toilet suite' and 'freestanding bath' return real filtered results, but some two/three-word phrases (e.g. 'shower mixer', 'concealed shower mixer', 'built in bath') return the full unfiltered catalog instead. Products below were sourced from whichever query phrasing actually filtered correctly, cross-checked against the Taps & Mixers category browse.

'bath_mixer' and 'shower_mixer' are both sourced from real Plumblink products, kept deliberately distinct: bath_mixer uses wall-mounted bath/shower mixer valves (STH Echo/Kappa range), shower_mixer uses Plumline Mensa 'Exposed Shower Mixer & Column Set' products which are explicitly labelled as shower mixers, not bath mixers.
All prices are Plumblink's own listed e-commerce prices, incl. VAT, confirmed live on 2026-07-10 - not estimated or derived.
